original_image_tags: The main text of the document is faded, partially reversed (as if seen through the back of the paper), and difficult to read in its entirety. Two punch holes are visible at the top center.

elements.description: Faint, reversed mirrored text from the opposite side of the page is visible, primarily a typed letter addressed to 'Mr. John B. Foster'. Several stamped ink markings are visible, including 'RECD-COPY TOURS FBI SEP 18 | 28 PM '63', 'SEP 18 1963', 'REC'D-READING ROOM FBI SEP 20 11 48 AM '63', 'REC'D MAIL ROOM FBI SEP 20 1 13 PM '63', 'SEP 20 12 03 PM '63', and 'RECEIVED-DIRECTOR F. B. I.'.

judge.reason: Description B provides detailed, specific quoted text of stamped ink markings that Description A omits, but the core claim of faint, reversed text is consistent and no contradiction exists in the specific text quoted by both.
